Advantages of Kedro Framework pipeline design:
    Modular structure
    Repeatable code
    Independent pipelines
    Ease of debugging
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
DATA SOURCES
    - veeva, iqvia, xfactory
DATABASE - DBEAVER/SNOWFLAKE
RAW LAYER
    aws s3, full set of inputs, just injetion, filters simple like 'country'
INTERMEDIATE LAYER
    technical layer, basic cleaning like remove backslashes, validation of data
PRIMARY
    joining datasets, combine related functionalities
FEATURE LAYER (comm_crm/comm_sales)
    featues are autogenerated
MODEL INPUT
    generated model input layer according to usecase
    
--------------------------------------------------------------------
--------------------------------------------------------------------
global_conf:
    o2n2 connector
    core connectors
        data_veeva
            raw
            intermediate
            primary
                common
        data_iqvia
        comm_crm
        comm_sales
        micro_segmentation
        reporting
--------------------------------------
Ex. For data_veeva connecotr/pipeline:
    data_veeva
        conf
            artefacts
            country_brand
                catalog -> catalog.yml
                nodes -> nodes.yml
                parameters -> parameters.yml
                pipelines.yml
        src
            contracts
                raw
                intermediate
                primary
            nodes
                raw
                intermediate
                primary
--------------------------------------
